rulings.Case Title: CALIFORNIA UNION SQUARE L.P. VS. SAKS & COMPANY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion By Petitioner California Union Square L.P. To Vacate Second Arbitration Award
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 6, 2019, Line 1, Motion 2 PETITIONER CALIFORNIA UNION SQUARE L.P.'s Motion By Petitioner California Union Square L.P. To Vacate Second Arbitration Award is is DENIED. The Court declines moving party's invitation to reconsider its prior ruling on Court's own motion. The motion to vacate the second arbitration award is DENIED. Moving party failed to show any grounds under CCP 1286.2 are applicable under the circumstances of this case. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 6, 2019, Line 2 CROSS-DEFENDANT DENNIS PETROU'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Cross-Complainant to allege facts, not conclusions establishing each element of each cause of action (Cross-Complainant is granted leave to amend to allege a cause of action for negligent interference with prospective economic advantage), re-assert conspiracy as basis for liability, not as a separate cause of action; allege actual controversy between cross-complainant and Petrou for the purposes of declaratory relief cause of action, no such controversy is currently alleged. The Court notes a misleading statement made in the opposition of page 2 line 26: "On August 22, 2017, notwithstanding ongoing litigation, including ¿ two unlawful detainer actions." Opposition did not provide case numbers for these "ongoing unlawful detainer actions" as of August 22, 2017 and the Court could not locate any that have not been dismissed or otherwise resolved as of that date. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL VS. CHUCK M. POST ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 6, 2019, Line 3 DEFENDANTS, LEM-RAY PROPERTIES I DE, LLC, and CHUCK POST's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is continued to May 10, 2019 at 9:30 AM in Department 501. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of reply no later than May 6, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/CFH)
